_schemaVersionSource: src/features/business-dna/schemas/business-dna-profile.schema.ts → BUSINESS_DNA_PROFILE_SCHEMA_VERSION — keep this value in sync; validate-packages.ts checks it.
_businessCountNote: Counts only packages with metadata.status === "published". ai-automation-agency is status "template" — a placeholder structure, not a registered business — so it contributes 0. The 4 Professional Services packages (accounting-firm, financial-consultancy, insurance-brokerage, tax-consultancy) plus the 4 Taxonomy Expansion packages (law-firm, hr-consultancy, recruitment-agency, business-consultancy) are all status "published", contributing 8. software-house, web-development-agency, and ai-consulting (Knowledge Authoring Batch 1, Technology Services expansion) are also "published", contributing a 9th, 10th, and 11th. mobile-app-development-agency, cybersecurity-consultancy, it-managed-services, devops-consultancy, and data-analytics-consultancy (Batch 2) contribute a 12th through 16th, completing all 9 planned technology-services businesses. marketing-agency, ecommerce-brand, coaching-business, architecture-studio, and real-estate-agency (Batch 3, first flagship businesses authored under the new marketing-agencies, ecommerce, coaching, architecture, and real-estate categories) contribute a 17th through 21st. cleaning-company, beauty-salon, dental-clinic, veterinary-clinic, and psychology-practice (Batch 4, first flagship businesses authored under the new cleaning-services, beauty-wellness, dental-clinics, veterinary-clinics, and psychology-practices categories) contribute a 22nd through 26th. Dental, veterinary, and psychology are all regulated/licensed healthcare-adjacent practices framed as business-planning content only, with no clinical, diagnostic, or treatment guidance. coffee-shop and restaurant (Batch 5, final batch, first flagship businesses authored under the new coffee-shops and restaurants categories) contribute a 27th and 28th, completing all 12 new canonical categories introduced in the 2026-07-10 Taxonomy Expansion. ai-chatbot-support-studio, boutique-pilates-studio, cloud-bookkeeping-startups, adventure-travel-boutique-agency, and tutoring-help-marketplace (Batch 6, first of 14 planned P2 batches, spanning technology-services, boutique-fitness-studios, accounting-firms, boutique-travel-agencies, and local-service-marketplaces respectively) contribute a 29th through 33rd. cloud-bookkeeping-startups is regulated accounting content, framed with the same educational-guidance discipline as the Professional Services batch, and is deliberately differentiated from accounting-firm (fully remote vs. hybrid, flat-tier vs. transaction-volume pricing, accelerator/VC referral vs. lawyer/consultant referral). tutoring-help-marketplace is the library's first genuine two-sided marketplace business, the only package with isHighlyScalable=true / scalabilityDna.level="high" as of Batch 6. rpa-workflow-consultancy, specialty-coffee-subscription-box, boutique-ip-law-practice, and home-repair-marketplace (Batch 7, second of 14 planned P2 batches, spanning technology-services, subscription-boxes, law-firms, and local-service-marketplaces respectively) contribute a 34th through 37th. boutique-ip-law-practice is regulated legal content, framed with the same educational-guidance discipline, and is deliberately differentiated from law-firm (patent-bar-qualified IP specialization vs. general practice, fully remote vs. hybrid, flat-fee/hourly split by matter type vs. blended hourly/GC-retainer pricing). home-repair-marketplace is the library's second genuine two-sided marketplace, differentiated from tutoring-help-marketplace by quote-based job pricing, contractor licensing/insurance vetting, and a job-guarantee insurance angle rather than session booking and background-check-only vetting. ai-sales-outreach-agency, upcycled-denim-label, fee-only-financial-planning-practice, and independent-podcast-production-studio (Batch 8, third of 14 planned P2 batches, spanning technology-services, sustainable-fashion-brands, financial-consultancies, and niche-content-studios respectively) contribute a 38th through 41st. fee-only-financial-planning-practice is regulated financial-advisory content, framed with the same educational-guidance discipline as financial-consultancy, and is deliberately differentiated from it (flat-fee/no-AUM vs. AUM-fee pricing, fully remote vs. hybrid, younger high-earner clients vs. pre-retirees/business-owner exit planning, content/SEO-driven vs. professional-referral-driven acquisition). ai-document-processing-saas, indoor-cycling-studio, expat-tax-advisory-practice, and personal-trainer-marketplace (Batch 9, fourth of 14 planned P2 batches, spanning technology-services, boutique-fitness-studios, tax-consultancies, and local-service-marketplaces respectively) contribute a 42nd through 45th. ai-document-processing-saas is the library's first genuine `saas` business model, distinct from every other technology-services package (all agencies or consultancies billing for people's time). indoor-cycling-studio is deliberately differentiated from boutique-pilates-studio (high-intensity music-driven cardio vs. low-impact strength/mobility, a younger cardio-focused rider vs. an injury-recovery/midlife-fitness niche, a competitive leaderboard retention mechanic vs. straightforward membership renewal). expat-tax-advisory-practice is regulated tax content, framed with the same educational-guidance discipline as tax-consultancy, and is deliberately differentiated from it (cross-border/year-round compliance niche vs. domestic/seasonal practice, fully remote vs. hybrid, expat-community/relocation-firm referral vs. local-accountant referral plus local SEO, isSeasonalBusiness false vs. true). personal-trainer-marketplace is the library's third genuine two-sided marketplace, differentiated from both tutoring-help-marketplace and home-repair-marketplace by combining session-based booking with home-repair's seriousness of liability verification (trainer certification plus physical-injury liability insurance, a distinct risk category from tutoring's minor-safety angle and home-repair's property-damage angle) plus a unique gym-partnership supply channel. See docs/domain/06-business-catalog.md.
